Table 1. Model parameters of the computational simulations

Figure 4. Oxygen-induced modulation of Caco-2 barrier function. (a) Schematic overview of the experimental design involving TEER measurements and transport assay; (b) TEER measurements performed before (Pre) and after (Post) barrier integrity assays in different oxygen tension regimes - hyperoxia, physioxia and hypoxia; and (c) relative apparent permeability for TMR-40kDa Dextran (n=6 samples per condition from 2 independent experiments, 3 measurements per sample) Data are presented as mean ± SD. Data normality: Shapiro-Wilk test. Statistics: t-test with Welch's correction between each pair of conditions. * p<0.05, ** p<0.01, ****p<0.0001

Figure 3. Oxygen-dependent Caco-2 cells monolayer organization.
